text: The Flexi Personal Loan offers amounts from $5,000 to $75,000 with tenures from 12 to 60 months. Interest rates start at 9.5% per annum for applicants with a credit score above 700.

The application window for new personal loan products launched this quarter (Q3) remains open until the end of the quarter, i.e. September 30th, after which standard year-round products apply instead.
Home Equity Line of Credit (HELOC) allows homeowners to borrow against their home equity, with variable interest rates currently starting at 7.2% per annum and a maximum draw period of 10 years.
The Premium Savings Account requires a minimum balance of $10,000 and offers 4.1% annual interest, compounded monthly, with no monthly maintenance fees.
Auto loans are available for both new and used vehicles, with tenures up to 72 months and rates starting at 6.8% per annum for new vehicles and 8.2% for used vehicles.
The Student Credit Card has no annual fee, a credit limit starting at $500, and is available to full-time students enrolled at an accredited institution with no prior credit history required.
